steps.title: Spot the parallel structure
steps.content: The passage lists two regulatory functions of guard cells in sequence: regulating carbon dioxide and regulating water loss. The transition must connect these as related, complementary functions.

steps.title: Apply the signal to find the transition
steps.content:
Additionally, properly connects these parallel functions by signaling “in addition”—we're adding another function guard cells perform.

The other three choices misframe the relationship as temporal (Previously), conclusive (In conclusion), or oppositional (Instead).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
